title: Landing Page Renders Correctly
description: Verify that the landing page renders the hero screen with app title and start button visible and interactive.

steps.description: Navigate to the landing page URL
Check that the hero screen with the application title is displayed
Check that the start button is visible and enabled

title: Landing Page Start Button Navigation
description: Ensure clicking the start button navigates the user to the quiz hub smoothly.

steps.description: Navigate to the landing page
Click the start button
Verify the quiz hub page is loaded

title: Quiz Hub Preset Category Cards Display
description: Check that preset quiz category cards are displayed correctly on the quiz hub page.

steps.description: Navigate to the quiz hub page
Verify all preset quiz category cards are visible
Each category card displays correct category information

title: Custom Quiz Builder Input Validation
description: Validate the custom quiz builder enforces required field validation and prevents starting quiz with invalid configurations.

steps.description: Navigate to quiz hub page
Attempt to start custom quiz with empty or invalid configuration (e.g. no word type selected)
Verify appropriate validation error messages are shown
Starting quiz is blocked until configuration is valid

title: Custom Quiz Settings Persistence Across Sessions
description: Ensure that custom quiz configurations are saved to localStorage and reloaded correctly on revisit.

steps.description: Configure a custom quiz with specific valid settings
Leave the quiz hub and close the browser session
Reopen the quiz hub page
Verify the custom quiz builder loads the previously saved configuration from localStorage

title: Preset Quiz Selection Starts Quiz Session
description: Verify selecting a preset quiz category loads and starts the quiz session with questions based on that category.

steps.description: Navigate to quiz hub
Select a preset quiz category card
Quiz page loads with questions generated according to preset configuration

title: Question Generation Matches Quiz Configuration
description: Verify that the quiz generates questions correctly based on the selected or customized quiz configuration (word types, conjugation targets, question formats).

steps.description: Start a quiz with a known configuration
Check each generated question matches the word types, conjugation targets, and formats specified

title: Answer Validation Handles Normalization and Accepted Variants
description: Ensure answers are validated correctly accounting for input normalization and recognizing multiple accepted variants for verb and adjective conjugations.

steps.description: Start quiz with questions requiring conjugation answers
Submit a correct answer using an accepted variant form or differing normalization (e.g. spacing, capitalization)
Verify the answer is accepted as correct
Submit incorrect/unrecognized variant
Verify the answer is marked incorrect and correction steps appear

title: Quiz Question Modes Work Correctly
description: Verify that multiple choice, fill-in-the-blank, and typing input question modes function properly including UI presentation, input acceptance, and answer feedback.

steps.description: Start quizzes configured to use each question mode separately
For multiple choice, options are displayed and selectable
For fill-in-the-blank, appropriate blanks appear in question text
For typing mode, input box is present and allows text entry
Submit correct and incorrect answers in each mode
Feedback is provided accordingly for correctness or correction

title: Skip Question Functionality
description: Verify that users can skip the current question and that the quiz advances to the next question correctly.

steps.description: During a quiz session, click the skip question control
The current question is skipped and the next question is displayed

title: Sound Toggle Persists Mute State and Plays Audio Feedback
description: Confirm the sound toggle controls mute state correctly, persists across page reloads, and plays audio feedback for user interactions when sound is enabled.

steps.description: Toggle sound off using sound toggle control
Reload the application
Verify sound remains muted after reload
Toggle sound back on
Trigger quiz interaction that plays audio feedback (e.g. answer submission)
Verify audio feedback sound plays

title: Theme Toggle Applies and Persists Theme Preference
description: Verify that toggling the theme control switches between light and dark modes and that the preference is saved and applied on subsequent visits.

steps.description: Toggle theme from default to dark mode
Verify the application root class reflects dark mode styling
Reload the page
Verify dark mode styling is applied automatically

title: Cheat Sheet Page Displays Correct Content
description: Verify that the cheat sheet reference page loads with conjugation rules and examples for verbs and adjectives presented clearly.

steps.description: Navigate to the cheat sheet page
Verify verb conjugation rules and examples are displayed
Verify adjective conjugation rules and examples are displayed

title: Navigation Controls and Browser History Integration
description: Ensure navigation controls allow smooth transitions between pages and that the browser back/forward buttons work as expected.

steps.description: Navigate from landing page to quiz hub to cheat sheet
Use navigation UI controls to move between pages
Verify pages load correctly according to navigation
Use browser back button repeatedly
Verify navigation history works and pages load correctly in reverse order
Use browser forward button
Verify navigation forward in history works correctly

title: Accessibility Checks for Core UI Components
description: Verify that the application UI components such as buttons, inputs, and navigation controls have proper aria-labels, support keyboard navigation, and work with screen readers.

steps.description: Navigate through the app using keyboard only (tab, enter, space)
Verify all interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard
Verify all buttons and inputs have appropriate aria-label attributes
Use screen reader to verify meaningful announcements and descriptions

title: Error Handling for Missing or Invalid Quiz Data
description: Check that the application shows meaningful user feedback and does not crash when quiz data is missing or config is invalid.

steps.description: Manipulate localStorage or URL query params to simulate missing or invalid quiz configuration
Navigate to the quiz page with invalid or missing data
Verify a meaningful error message or fallback state is displayed to the user
Verify the app does not crash or become unresponsive

title: Performance Benchmark: Question Generation Responsiveness
description: Verify that question generation and UI updates during the quiz session meet required performance benchmarks (e.g. completes within 500ms).

steps.description: Start a quiz session with complex configuration
Measure and verify question generation and rendering completes within acceptable time limits

title: Answer Feedback Correctness and Correction Flow
description: Check that after submitting an answer, the feedback indicates correctness and if incorrect, the correction step is shown with explanation.

steps.description: Submit a correct answer
Verify positive feedback is displayed and the quiz advances
Submit an incorrect answer
Verify correction interface appears with explanations or hints
